name: Indian Rice Blancmange
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Rose water or 2-3 drops rose essence
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix some cold milk with the ground rice to a smooth cream.
2. Bring the remaining milk and sugar to a boil, stirring with a wooden spoon until thickened.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the creamed ground rice. Return the pan to heat and stir constantly until the mixture boils and thickens for 3 minutes.
4. Sprinkle cardamom, rose water or essence, and half of the chopped pistachios (or almonds) over the mixture. Stir well.
5. Pour into individual dessert dishes and decorate the tops with remaining pistachios or almonds, slivered.
6. Serve warm or chilled.
